perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a wide shot of an office environment, showcasing several rows of desks cluttered with various items. The camera pans across the room to show the overall state of the workspace. (2) A series of quick cuts follow, each focusing on a different desk belonging to a specific colleague. These desks are filled with monitors, keyboards, stationery, personal decorations like Pikachu and Crayon Shin-chan plushies, and scattered boxes. (3) The camera then settles on a particularly disorganized desk. A hand enters the frame from the bottom, gesturing toward the mess. The camera zooms in slightly as the hand points at a growing stack of storage boxes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and playful electronic background music starts immediately, setting a lighthearted tone. (2) Around the 13-second mark, a female voice enters. She speaks in a humorous and slightly teasing tone. (3) The music continues at a steady volume as the female narrator finishes her observation, concluding the video on a whimsical note.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '辦公室搬家事隔半年...' (Six months after the office move...) - Hook text setting the context. (2) Functional text labels appearing over different desks: '包子', '云琪', '大丁', '禁慾', 'KIKI', '小白鼠'. (3) '大魔王 李佩潔' (The Demon King Li Peijie) - Humorous title identifying the subject of the final focus. (4) Functional subtitles for the narration: '這是李佩潔的桌子 收納盒原本只有這一個 現在有3個 我們看看再過半年 會有幾個盒子呢？' (This is Li Peijie's desk. There used to be only one storage box, now there are 3. Let's see how many boxes there will be in another half year?)

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro wide shot -> Montage of desks -> Close-up focus on a specific messy desk

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One female hand visible gesturing towards objects; one female narrator voice heard.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Only a hand with light skin tone is visible; the narrator is not seen.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical modern office layout with white adjustable desks, ergonomic chairs, and numerous white storage cabinets. The background is filled with office supplies, computer equipment, and personal trinkets.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage -> Hook: Progression from general office status to a specific humorous example.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lighthearted commentary on office culture and personal organizational habits. By showcasing the 'deterioration' of a colleague's desk organization over six months, it creates a relatable and humorous moment for viewers familiar with workplace dynamics and the inevitable accumulation of clutter.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of 'The Demon King' (大魔王) label to humorously exaggerate a colleague's trait.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video captures a slice-of-life office moment, relying on shared cultural understanding of workplace tropes like the 'messy desk' colleague.
